response.justification: Bogdan Szabo's resume demonstrates strong software development experience with diverse technologies and leadership in full-stack and embedded systems, but lacks direct experience in hardware optimization, AI accelerators, SoC/IP modeling, or deep-learning workload analysis. His background in web/mobile development and general software engineering does not align closely with the principal-level requirements for cloud infrastructure and hardware optimization. Additionally, there is no evidence of advanced degrees (PhD/Master's) or extensive experience in AI accelerator architectures.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with expertise in full-stack and embedded systems development
Proven leadership in open-source projects and developer tooling (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Experience in performance optimization for low-latency applications and real-time systems
concerns: No direct experience with SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerators, or hardware-software co-design
Lacks required qualifications (e.g., PhD or Master's in relevant field, or sufficient years of experience with Bachelor's)
No demonstrated background in deep neural network training/inference optimization or GPU architecture

key_factors.factor: Relevant technical experience in AI accelerators/hardware optimization
Experience with SoC/IP modeling and system architecture design
